message:
feat(db): add resolve_experience() with unified terminal resolution (br-bn0vb.3)

Adds ResolutionKind enum to core and resolve_experience() to db crate,
supporting Open→Resolved/Censored/Expired with idempotent same-outcome
and conflicting re-resolve rejection. 8 new tests, all 13 lifecycle
tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
